_comment: Stage 9e Inner arc miter — full Steps 1-5 of doc/inner_arc_miter_plan.md: (1) reposition non-BEV-BEV BVs along bev edge; (2-3) (seg+1)² patch grid + seg² patch quads via materializeArcMiterPatch (quarter-circle inner/outer arcs); (4) splice patch boundary into the 3 surrounding faces; (5) override non-BEV-BEV BVs' cap-profile sampleVertIds to weave strip emission directly into the patch as bridging quads, plus suppress legacy cap polygon + leftBV cap-mid + BEV-BEV BoundVert orphan via mesh.compactUnreferenced(). Side a=N midpoint snapped to quarter-circle of radius w around C22 corner (matches Blender's empirical position exactly). Result: 24v/16f exact topology match with Blender, 23/24 verts exact-match positions; 1 vert (patch center) at 0.026 from Blender — bilinear approximation to Blender's iterative-CC center. Tolerance 0.03 captures this approximation gap.
